name: email-mcp
description: Read, search, send, and manage emails via IMAP and SMTP. Works with any email provider — Gmail, Outlook, Fastmail, and more.
long_description: A general-purpose email integration for Claude. Connect any IMAP/SMTP-compatible email account and give Claude the ability to check your inbox, search messages, compose and send emails, and organize your mailbox. Supports SSL, STARTTLS, and unencrypted connections with configurable ports and credentials.

account_1_label.title: Account 1 — Label
account_1_label.description: Custom label for account 1 (e.g. 'personal', 'work'). Defaults to 'account1' if empty.

account_1_email_address.title: Account 1 — Email Address
account_1_email_address.description: Email address for account 1 (also used as the From address and default username)

account_1_email_password.title: Account 1 — Password / App Password
account_1_email_password.description: Password or app-specific password for account 1. For Gmail, use an App Password.

account_1_imap_security.title: Account 1 — IMAP Security
account_1_imap_security.description: IMAP connection security: ssl (port 993), starttls (port 143), or none

account_1_smtp_security.title: Account 1 — SMTP Security
account_1_smtp_security.description: SMTP connection security: ssl (port 465), starttls (port 587), or none (port 25)

account_1_imap_port.title: Account 1 — IMAP Port
account_1_imap_port.description: Custom IMAP port (leave empty for default based on security mode)

account_1_smtp_port.title: Account 1 — SMTP Port
account_1_smtp_port.description: Custom SMTP port (leave empty for default based on security mode)

account_1_email_username.title: Account 1 — Username
account_1_email_username.description: IMAP/SMTP login username if different from email address. Leave empty to use the email address.

account_1_ssl_verify.title: Account 1 — Verify SSL Certificates
account_1_ssl_verify.description: Set to 'false' to skip TLS certificate verification (not recommended)

account_1_sent_folder.title: Account 1 — Sent Folder
account_1_sent_folder.description: Mailbox path for saving sent emails

account_2_label.title: Account 2 — Label
account_2_label.description: Custom label for account 2 (e.g. 'pro', 'work'). Defaults to 'account2' if empty.

account_2_email_address.title: Account 2 — Email Address
account_2_email_address.description: Email address for account 2. Leave empty if not using a second account.

account_2_email_password.title: Account 2 — Password / App Password
account_2_email_password.description: Password or app-specific password for account 2

account_2_imap_security.title: Account 2 — IMAP Security
account_2_imap_security.description: IMAP connection security for account 2: ssl, starttls, or none

account_2_smtp_security.title: Account 2 — SMTP Security
account_2_smtp_security.description: SMTP connection security for account 2: ssl, starttls, or none

account_2_email_username.title: Account 2 — Username
account_2_email_username.description: IMAP/SMTP login username for account 2 if different from email address

account_2_ssl_verify.title: Account 2 — Verify SSL Certificates
account_2_ssl_verify.description: Set to 'false' to skip TLS certificate verification for account 2

account_2_sent_folder.title: Account 2 — Sent Folder
account_2_sent_folder.description: Mailbox path for saving sent emails for account 2

account_3_label.title: Account 3 — Label
account_3_label.description: Custom label for account 3 (e.g. 'consulting', 'personal'). Defaults to 'account3' if empty.

account_3_email_address.title: Account 3 — Email Address
account_3_email_address.description: Email address for account 3. Leave empty if not using a third account.

account_3_email_password.title: Account 3 — Password / App Password
account_3_email_password.description: Password or app-specific password for account 3

account_3_imap_security.title: Account 3 — IMAP Security
account_3_imap_security.description: IMAP connection security for account 3: ssl, starttls, or none

account_3_smtp_security.title: Account 3 — SMTP Security
account_3_smtp_security.description: SMTP connection security for account 3: ssl, starttls, or none

account_3_email_username.title: Account 3 — Username
account_3_email_username.description: IMAP/SMTP login username for account 3 if different from email address

account_3_ssl_verify.title: Account 3 — Verify SSL Certificates
account_3_ssl_verify.description: Set to 'false' to skip TLS certificate verification for account 3

account_3_sent_folder.title: Account 3 — Sent Folder
account_3_sent_folder.description: Mailbox path for saving sent emails for account 3

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: List available mailboxes/folders (INBOX, Sent, Drafts, Archive, Trash, etc.)

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: List emails in a mailbox with pagination, newest first

tools.name: fetch_email
tools.description: Fetch a single email by UID with full body and attachment info

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search emails by sender, recipient, subject, body, date range, or read/unread status

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Compose and send an email via SMTP with support for CC, BCC, reply-to, and HTML

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move an email to another folder (e.g. Archive, Trash, Junk)

tools.name: mark_email
tools.description: Mark an email as read or unread
